name: Grey Market
description: Tarps snap overhead while scavenged hardware glints from folding tables and open crates.
detail: Everything here looks one firmware patch away from betrayal, including the sellers.

fixtures.name: open crates
fixtures.inspect: Crates of stripped hardware sit open to the rain like the district has given up pretending theft needs a wrapper.

mood: Half the tarps are down; the vendors are pretending the wind did it.
A stack of new clinic-sealed crates is sitting where it shouldn't, and nobody is meeting eyes near it.
A buyer in a Bureau-issue raincoat just walked the row twice and bought nothing.

scavenge.note: You sift the market's spillover for anything too cheap to guard and too useful to leave.
scavenge.message: A vendor's throwaway crate gives up a usable wiretap kit and no clean explanation.
